City of Malolos Pickleball Club
February 20 at 1:08 AM

Full House at our Thursday Open Play! 


Courts filled with fun, laughter, and an awesome mix of beginners and seasoned players — just like the good old days.

This is the kind of energy we love. This is what pickleball is all about. Let’s bring it back! 

Pickleball is meant to be played with fun.

A huge thank you to our visitors, non-members, and of course our amazing members for bringing the energy and making the night extra special. We appreciate every single one of yo… See more
